questions.question: What is the name of the fictional Los Angeles skyscraper where John McClane takes on Hans Gruber in Die Hard?
In the 1994 action thriller Speed, what is the minimum miles-per-hour speed the city bus must maintain to keep the bomb from exploding?
In the 1987 film Predator, which actor plays Al Dillon, the CIA operative who shares an iconic mid-air arm-wrestle handshake with Arnold Schwarzenegger's character?
What is the name of the heavily armed, blind guitarist who plays a flame-throwing electric guitar atop a moving vehicle in Mad Max: Fury Road?
What is the name of the massive, mega-corporation that creates RoboCop and effectively runs the Detroit Police Department?
In the John Woo classic Face/Off, what is the name of the unhinged terrorist mastermind played by Nicolas Cage?
What is the name of the Cyberdyne Systems scientist responsible for creating the neural-net processor that will eventually become Skynet?
What does the acronym "IMF" stand for in the Mission: Impossible franchise?
Which character famously tells Neo, "You take the blue pill, the story ends... You take the red pill, you stay in Wonderland"?
When addressing the Emperor in Gladiator, Maximus identifies himself as the commander of the Armies of the North and the General of which specific legions?
In the original 1986 Top Gun, what is the callsign of Tom Cruise’s wingman and best friend, Nick Bradshaw?
The 1996 action hit The Rock centers on a rogue group of Marines holding hostages on which famous former prison island?
In The Bourne Identity, Jason Bourne travels to a Swiss bank to open a safety deposit box containing his passports and money. In which specific city is this bank located?
Detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett work for the specialized tactical unit of which city's police department?
What is the name of the retired CIA operative played by Liam Neeson in the Taken franchise?
The acclaimed Indonesian action film The Raid: Redemption heavily showcases which specific traditional Southeast Asian martial art?
What is the name of the fictional Washington town where John Rambo is arrested and harassed by the local sheriff in First Blood?
In the 1991 surfing action movie Point Break, Patrick Swayze plays the leader of a bank-robbing crew. What is the name of his character?
The legendary 1992 teahouse and hospital shootout film Hard Boiled was directed by which iconic master of Hong Kong heroic bloodshed cinema?
In the 1985 Schwarzenegger vehicle Commando, a young actress plays John Matrix's kidnapped daughter, Jenny. What is the name of this actress?
In Dirty Harry, Inspector Harry Callahan famously wields a Smith & Wesson Model 29 revolver. What caliber ammunition does this handgun fire?
In the movie Taken, Liam Neeson's character Bryan Mills famously claims he has a "particular set of skills" acquired over a long career in which government agency?
In the original John Wick, what breed of puppy is left behind by John's late wife, whose death triggers his entire revenge campaign?
What is the full military title used by Charlize Theron's character in Mad Max: Fury Road?
What is the name of the corrupt, power-hungry Roman Emperor played by Joaquin Phoenix in Gladiator?
What is the full name of the elite black-ops mercenary played by Chris Hemsworth in the Extraction franchise?
While the first Die Hard takes place in a corporate tower, Die Hard 2 traps John McClane at which major international airport?
Which actor brilliantly brings the chilling, monotone program Agent Smith to life in The Matrix trilogy?
In the 1994 action-comedy True Lies, which actress plays Jamie Lee Curtis and Arnold Schwarzenegger’s rebellious teenage daughter, Dana?
Departing from James Bond's traditional game of Baccarat, what specific variant of poker is played at the high-stakes tournament in Casino Royale?
At the beginning of The Bourne Identity, Jason Bourne finds a laser projector hidden under his skin that displays the account number for a bank in which Swiss city?
The plot of the original 1995 Bad Boys kicks off when $100 million worth of what specific drug is stolen directly out of the Miami Police headquarters secure vault?
In Terminator 2: Judgment Day, what is the first name of John Connor's dirt-bike-riding, arcade-loving best friend who helps him hack an ATM?
Gary Oldman plays the ruthless, ultra-nationalist terrorist leader Ivan Korshunov who hijacks the President's plane in which 1997 action film?
Before becoming an FBI agent in Point Break, Johnny Utah was a standout college football quarterback for which university?
In Raiders of the Lost Ark, Indiana Jones confronts Belloq and the Nazis on an unnamed island located in which body of water right before the Ark is opened?
Throughout the Lethal Weapon series, Roger Murtaugh spends his off-hours working on a personal boat that he has poetically named what?
In Mission: Impossible – Fallout, Ethan Hunt and the IMF team are racing to recover three missing spheres made of what weaponized element?
What is the name of Alex Murphy's tough, loyal police partner who witnesses his brutal ambush and later helps RoboCop remember his past?
In the Sylvester Stallone sci-fi actioner Demolition Man, John Spartan is cryogenically frozen in 1996 and thawed out to track Simon Phoenix in what specific year?
In the movie The Rock, General Hummel threatens San Francisco with rocket warheads loaded with what deadly, skin-melting nerve agent?
In the climax of Top Gun: Maverick, Maverick and Rooster escape enemy territory by stealing what specific, outdated model of fighter jet from a bombed hangar?
In John Wick: Chapter 4, John seeks refuge at the Osaka Continental. What is the name of the hotel manager and close friend who dies protecting him?
What classic Run-D.M.C. Christmas song plays over the opening scenes and closing credits of Die Hard?
What is the everyday hacker alias/real name of Neo before he is freed from the Matrix?
In the original 1984 Terminator, the T-800 travels back in time to target Sarah Connor in which major U.S. city?
What is the name of the tyrannical warlord who controls the water supply and rules over the Citadel in Mad Max: Fury Road?
In Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol, Tom Cruise famously scales the exterior of which real-world, record-breaking Dubai skyscraper?
In Gladiator, which Roman general-turned-gladiator seeks vengeance for the execution of his wife and son?
In the movie Speed, what is the first name of Jack Traven's LAPD SWAT partner, played by Jeff Daniels, who is later killed by the bomber?
Though she is referred to as "The Bride" for most of the films, what is the character's actual first and last name revealed in Kill Bill: Volume 2?
In the Lethal Weapon franchise, Martin Riggs lives in a beachfront trailer with his loyal pet dog, Sam. What breed of dog is Sam?
In the action movie Face/Off, John Travolta plays an obsessive FBI agent tracking down a terrorist. What is the character's name?
At the start of The Bourne Identity, an amnesiac Jason Bourne is rescued from the Mediterranean Sea by a fishing boat from which country?
In the opening scene of the 1995 film Bad Boys, Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett get into a heated argument while driving what specific model of high-end sports car?
In Con Air, what type of military division did Cameron Poe serve in, an expert skill set that makes him an elite lethal weapon on the plane?
When FBI agent Johnny Utah goes undercover to infiltrate the bank-robbing surfers in Point Break, what fake first name does he use?
In the original 1986 Top Gun, what real-world American fighter plane was painted black and used to stand in for the fictional Soviet "MiG-28"?
In First Blood, John Rambo is revealed to be a highly decorated veteran of which elite, specialized U.S. Army Special Forces unit?
What is the moniker of the psychopathic, rooftop sniper villain hunted by Harry Callahan in the original 1971 Dirty Harry?
In Die Hard with a Vengeance, Jeremy Irons plays the brilliant, puzzle-loving terrorist Simon Peter Gruber. Who was his famous brother?
In the Lethal Weapon sequels, Roger Murtaugh owns a personal boat named after the LAPD radio code for a lunch break. What is this name?
What is the first name of John McClane's estranged wife, whom he travels to Los Angeles to visit in Die Hard?
Which actor plays the cold, liquid-metal T-1000 assassin sent to kill John Connor in Terminator 2: Judgment Day?
What is the first name of the sophisticated manager and co-owner of the New York Continental Hotel, played by Ian McShane?
What is the first name of Sandra Bullock's character, the passenger who takes over driving the runaway bus in Speed?
What is the full name of the sadistic Detroit crime lord responsible for the "killing" of Alex Murphy in RoboCop?
In Con Air, John Malkovich plays the brilliant, highly dangerous mastermind behind the plane hijacking. What is his character's colorful criminal nickname?
In The Rock, Ed Harris plays a rogue Brigadier General holding San Francisco hostage. What branch of the military do his elite, renegade soldiers belong to?
What is the actual first and last name of Maverick's intense rival "Iceman," played by Val Kilmer in Top Gun?
In The Bourne Identity, Jason Bourne hitches a ride across Europe with Marie in her beat-up, iconic European compact car. What specific make and model is it?
In Point Break, the bank robbers wear rubber masks of former U.S. presidents. Which actor's character, Bodhi, wears the Ronald Reagan mask as the group leader?
The terrifying plot of Taken kicks into high gear when Bryan Mills' daughter, Kim, is kidnapped by human traffickers while vacationing in which European capital city?
Which veteran character actor plays Will Teasle, the stubborn town sheriff who makes the mistake of pushing John Rambo too far in First Blood?
In the opening sequence of True Lies, secret agent Harry Tasker infiltrates a high-society Swiss chalet and shares an intimate, high-stakes tango dance with a character played by which actress?
In Predator, the character Blain (played by Jesse Ventura) carries an incredibly heavy, modified handheld M134 military minigun that he affectionately nicknames what?
In Die Hard, the action primarily takes place within the high-rise building owned by a Japanese corporation. What is its specific name?
What is the specific name of the exclusive hotel chain that serves as a neutral ground for assassins in the John Wick universe?
What is the birth name of the character Neo, revealed to him by Morpheus in The Matrix?
What is the full name of the tyrannical leader of The Citadel in Mad Max: Fury Road?
What is the full name of the disgruntled former bomb squad member who orchestrates the bus bombing in Speed?
What is the name of the corporation responsible for the creation of Skynet in the Terminator universe?
What is the full name of the FBI agent protagonist in the film Sicario?
What is the full name of the former MI6 agent turned anarchist leader who serves as the primary antagonist in Mission: Impossible – Fallout?
What is the full name of the young girl who forms an unlikely bond with hitman Léon in Léon: The Professional?
What is the full name of the rogue Brigadier General who seizes Alcatraz Island in The Rock?
What is the full name of the drug lord who occupies the top floor of the apartment building in The Raid: Redemption?
What is the maiden name of John McClane's wife, Holly, whom he travels to Los Angeles to visit in Die Hard?
